additionalAlertManager.description: The additionalAlertManager allows you to use AlertManager outside the cloud

additionalAlertRelabel.description: The additionalAlertRelabel allows you to set additional Prometheus alert relabel configurations

additionalScrape.description: The additionalScrape allows you to monitor hosts outside the cloud

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

containers.description: Containers allows injecting additional containers or modifying operator generated containers

enableAdminAPI.description: Enable access to prometheus web admin API. Enabling this exposes mutating endpoints and should be used with care

enableFeatures.description:
Enable access to Prometheus disabled features.
Enabling disabled features is entirely outside the scope of what the maintainers will support and by doing so,
you accept that this behavior may break at any time without notice.

externalLabels.description: The labels to add to any time series or alerts when communicating with external systems

externalUrl.description: Prometheus instances will be available under this URL, necessary to generate correct URLs when Prometheus is not served from root

image.description:
A docker image to use for prometheus deployment
Default: docker.io/prom/prometheus:v3.2.1

ingress.description: Allows create Ingress for Prometheus UI via monitoring-operator

install.description: Allow to create Ingress for Prometheus UI

annotations.description: Annotations for the Prometheus Ingress. Allows to set up authorization e.g. via ingress-nginx

labels.description: Labels for the Prometheus Ingress. Default monitoring-operator labels can be overwritten

tlsSecretName.description: Name of secret with TLS configs: tls.crt and tls.key. The secret must exist.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints for the operator

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

image.description:
A docker image to use for prometheus operator deployment
Default: quay.io/prometheus-operator/prometheus-operator:v0.80.1

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize objects

namespaces.description:
Comma separated list of namespaces the interaction of the Prometheus Operator and the apiserver in non-privileged mode.
This parameter is unnecessary if the prometheus-operator has ClusterRole on all namespaces.

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the operator Pods are scheduled on

paused.description: Set paused to reconciliation for prometheus-operator

install.description: Install operator pod monitor to collect self-metrics

interval.description: Allow change metrics scrape interval for the operator pod monitor

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabeling configurations for the operator pod monitor

relabelings.description: Relabeling configurations for the operator pod monitor

scrapeTimeout.description: Allow change metrics scrape timeout for the operator pod monitor. Please note scrapeTimeout must be less than interval

podMonitor.description: Pod monitor for self-monitoring of the operator

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName assigned to the Pods to prevent them from evicting. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#priorityclass

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for operator Pods

limits.description: Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed

requests.description: Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required

securityContext.description: SecurityContext holds pod-level security attributes for the operator

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in the container image metadata if unspecified. May also be set in the security context of individual containers. If set in both SecurityContext and container, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.

annotations.description: Annotations for the operator service account

labels.description: Labels for the operator service account

serviceAccount.description: Service account settings for the operator

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the operator pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints

paused.description: Set paused to reconcilation for prometheus

install.description: Install podMonitor to collect self-metrics from Prometheus

metricRelabelings.description:
Metric relabeling is applied to samples as the last step before ingestion. It has the same configuration
 format and actions as target relabeling. Metric relabeling does not apply to automatically
generated timeseries such as up.
Ref: https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs

relabelings.description: The configuration which allows to dynamically rewrite the label set of a target before it gets scraped.

scrapeTimeout.description:
Allow change metrics scrape timeout. Please note that scrapeTimeout must be less than interval.
 Ref: https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config

podMonitorNamespaceSelector.description: The namespace selector for pod monitors. Namespace's labels to match PodMonitor discovery. Labels selector requirements use matchExpressions. The requirements are combined with a logical 'AND'

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClassName sets the priority class name for the Prometheus Pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#priorityclass

lookbackDelta.description: The delta difference allowed for retrieving metrics during expression evaluations

maxConcurrency.description: The maximum number of queries that can be executed concurrently

maxSamples.description: The maximum number of samples that can be processed in a single query

timeout.description: The maximum time a query can take before being aborted

query.description: QuerySpec defines the query command line flags when starting Prometheus

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for single Pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

requests.description: The minimum compute resources required by a single container. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#requests-and-limits

limits.description: The maximum compute resources allowed for a single container. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/#requests-and-limits

retention.description: Retention determines when to remove old data

retentionsize.description: RetentionSize determines the maximum number of bytes that storage blocks can use

ruleNamespaceSelector.description: The namespace selector for rules. Namespace's labels to match Rule discovery. Labels selector requirements use matchExpressions. The requirements are combined with a logical 'AND'

scrapeTimeout.description: Number of seconds to wait for target to respond before erroring

secrets.description: Secrets to mount into the Prometheus Pods

runAsUser.description: The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process. Defaults to user specified in the container image metadata if unspecified. May also be set in the security context of individual containers. If set in both SecurityContext and container, the value specified in SecurityContext takes precedence.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize objects

serviceAccount.description: Service account for monitoring-operator to use

serviceMonitorNamespaceSelector.description: The namespace selector for service monitors. Namespace's labels to match ServiceMonitor discovery. Labels selector requirements use matchExpressions. The requirements are combined with a logical 'AND'

storage.description:
Storage spec to specify how storage shall be used.
More info: https://github.com/prometheus-operator/prometheus-operator/blob/master/Documentation/api.md#storagespec

createSecret.description: Create TLS secret with provided configuration

name.description: The name of the secret to create with the provided TLS configuration

ca.description: The CA certificate to use for TLS communication

key.description: The private key to use for TLS communication

cert.description: The certificate to use for TLS communication

enabled.description: Generate TLS certs using cert-manager. This will create a Certificate resource with the provided configuration and a self-signed ClusterIssuer

secretName.description: The name of the secret where the generated TLS certs will be stored

clusterIssuerName.description: The name of the cluster issuer to use for generating TLS certs

duration.description: The duration of the generated TLS certs

renewBefore.description: The time before the TLS certs expire to renew them

webTLSConfig.description: TLS configuration for Prometheus web endpoint

name.description: The name of the secret containing the TLS private key for the Prometheus web endpoint

key.description: The key in the secret containing the TLS private key for the Prometheus web endpoint

keySecret.description: The secret containing the TLS private key for the Prometheus web endpoint

cert.description: The certificate to use for TLS communication on the Prometheus web endpoint

secret.description: The secret containing the TLS certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

name.description: The name of the secret containing the TLS certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

key.description: The key in the secret containing the TLS certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

client_ca.description: The client CA configuration for TLS communication on the Prometheus web endpoint

secret.description: The secret containing the client CA certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

name.description: The name of the secret containing the client CA certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

key.description: The key in the secret containing the client CA certificate for the Prometheus web endpoint

volumeMounts.description:
VolumeMounts allows configuration of additional VolumeMounts on the output StatefulSet definition.
More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.18/#volume-v1-core

volumes.description:
Volumes allows configuration of additional volumes on the output StatefulSet definition
More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.18/#volumemount-v1-core
